security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Acoustic PSF viewer for microphone arrays
bundle.longDescription: Visualise the acoustic point-spread function of a microphone array with a near-field delay-and-sum beamformer, a rotatable 3-D geometry view and a filled-contour PSF map.
